PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('profile')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      PsiElement(NAME)('test')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement([)('[')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
            PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('foo')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''/etc/foo'')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('bar')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
          PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('12')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiComment(COMMENT)('# chosen by random dice roll')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
        PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Optional')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement([)('[')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
              PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Struct')
              PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
                PsiElement([)('[')
                PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
                  PsiElement({)('{')
                  PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
                  PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
                    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                      PsiElement(NAME)('a')
                    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                    PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                    PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
                      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Hash')
                      PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
                        PsiElement([)('[')
                        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
                        PsiElement(,)(',')
                        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                        PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
                          PsiElement(REGEX)('/\d+\.\d+\.\d+/')
                        PsiElement(])(']')
                  PsiElement(,)(',')
                  PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
                  PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
                    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                      PsiElement(NAME)('b')
                    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                    PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                    PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
                      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
                      PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
                        PsiElement([)('[')
                        PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                          PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
                        PsiElement(])(']')
                  PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
                  PsiElement(})('}')
                PsiElement(])(']')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('baz')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionUndefImpl(EXPRESSION_UNDEF)
          PsiElement(UNDEF)('undef')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('file')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('foo')
            PsiElement(:)(':')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
            PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
              PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
                PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('present')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
              PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('content')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
                  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                    PsiElement($)('$')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('bar')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                  PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('"')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n  ')
      PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
        PsiElement(IF)('if')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('baz')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement({)('{')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
            PsiPuppetExpressionCallImpl(EXPRESSION_CALL)
              PsiPuppetExpressionIndexedImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEXED)
                Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                  PsiElement($)('$')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('baz')
                PsiPuppetExpressionIndexImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEX)
                  PsiElement([)('[')
                  PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                    PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''a'')
                  PsiElement(])(']')
              PsiElement(.)('.')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('each')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
                PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
                  PsiElement(|)('|')
                  PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
                    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                      PsiElement($)('$')
                      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('key')
                  PsiElement(,)(',')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
                    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                      PsiElement($)('$')
                      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('value')
                  PsiElement(|)('|')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
                  PsiElement({)('{')
                  PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
                  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
                    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                      PsiElement(NAME)('package')
                    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
                      PsiElement({)('{')
                      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
                        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                          PsiElement($)('$')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('key')
                        PsiElement(:)(':')
                        PsiWhiteSpace('\n        ')
                        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
                          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                              PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
                            PsiWhiteSpace('   ')
                            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                              PsiElement($)('$')
                              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('value')
                          PsiElement(,)(',')
                          PsiWhiteSpace('\n        ')
                          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                              PsiElement(NAME)('provider')
                            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                            PsiPuppetExpressionIndexedImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEXED)
                              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                                PsiElement($)('$')
                                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('baz')
                              PsiPuppetExpressionIndexImpl(EXPRESSION_INDEX)
                                PsiElement([)('[')
                                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''b'')
                                PsiElement(])(']')
                          PsiElement(,)(',')
                      PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
                      PsiElement(})('}')
                  PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
                  PsiElement(})('}')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
